task: Final double-stringify sweep (sibling of the task-create #970 and money-path #971 fixes) — the remaining NON-money api clients. Same root cause: these passed body: JSON.stringify(...) to apiRequest, which already does the single JSON.stringify, so the body double-encoded to a quoted JSON string and the server would 400 'expected object, received string' on use. Fix (frontend only, no migration): pass the RAW OBJECT in compliance.createComplianceRule, document-alerts.updateDocumentAlertRule + acknowledgeDocumentAlert, useMaintenancePartsCatalog (parts-master create), USMCAActivationPanel (transition + checklist-item), and the safety anomaly RuleEditor (seed-defaults) + AnomalyDashboard (resolve). Adds api/nonmoney-double-stringify.test.ts asserting the compliance + document-alert bodies are objects. After this, a full-frontend scan shows ZERO remaining apiRequest+JSON.stringify double-stringify sites.
